data.title: Chemed Corp authorizes $300M for stock buyback, declares 60-cent quarterly dividend. Board of Directors has approved.
data.description: Chemed Corporation (NYSE: CHE) based in Cincinnati, revealed that their Board of Directors officially approved an extra $300 million for buying back stocks as part of the current share repurchase plan. This buyback initiative will be financed through a mix of operational cash flow and drawing from their revolving credit facility. The Board also declared a quarterly cash dividend of 60-cents per share on the company's capital stock, ensuring continued returns for shareholders.
Company purchased 100,000 of its own shares. Transaction completed today.

data.title: Wounded Warrior Project & NFL promote mental health awareness. 6 in 10 post-9/11 veterans struggle, highlights partnership efforts.
data.description: Morgan Fox, a defensive end playing for the Atlanta Falcons, and his father, an Army veteran, are challenging the stereotype that tough guys don't seek help. Based on data, mental health continues to be a significant issue for post-9/11 veterans, with over 60% of warriors facing challenges in this area. Their story underscores the importance of addressing mental health concerns within the veteran community.
COLOMBIA EX-PRESIDENT URIBE SENTENCED TO 12 YEARS FOR ABUSE OF PROCESS, BRIBERY - REPORTS
JUDGE'S SENTENCING OF URIBE EXPECTED AT 1400 LOCAL TIME

data.title: Horizon Technology Finance to release Q2 2025 financial results. NASDAQ: HRZN provides secured loans to tech companies.
data.description: In Farmington, Connecticut, Horizon Technology Finance Corporation (NASDAQ: HRZN), a prominent specialty finance company associated with Monroe Capital, disclosed its intention to report financial results for the second quarter. Horizon provides secured loans to various companies in industries such as technology, life science, healthcare, information services, and sustainability. Stay tuned for updates from Horizon.

data.title: New nonprofit initiative launched in Boulder, Colo. aiming to empower leaders for global systemic change.
data.description: A unique community educational platform and nonprofit project, aimed at empowering leaders to promote systemic change on a global scale, was launched in Boulder, Colorado on August 1, 2025. The initiative addresses various pressing global issues such as climate change, systemic inequality, etc.

data.title: DeFi Cattos introduces core engine for sustainable gaming on Aptos, the first real-time RPG. Aptos aims to be Global Trading Engine.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, in Singapore, the world witnessed the launch of the first real-time battle RPG on Aptos, heralding a groundbreaking era for on-chain gameplay and player rewards. This development signifies a defining moment in Aptos' journey towards establishing itself as the Global Trading Engine, with the entire ecosystem experiencing a surge in activity. The innovation is propelled by the increasing popularity of Bitcoin, with the game successfully integrating blockchain technology to revolutionize the gaming experience.

data.title: Orca Energy Group Inc. initiates arbitrations against Tanzania for $1.2 billion project dispute.
data.description: Orca has initiated legal actions against the United Republic of Tanzania and Tanzania Petroleum Development Corporation in regards to a project valued at US$1.2 billion.

data.title: 2025 EBA Stress Test affirms BNP Paribas' robust shock absorption and structural resilience.
data.description: The 2025 European Banking Authority stress test has reported that BNP Paribas has exhibited a strong shock absorption capacity and structural resilience. The results indicate that BNP Paribas is well-equipped to withstand adverse economic conditions and unforeseen challenges, further solidifying its position in the financial sector. The stress test outcomes highlight BNP Paribas' robustness in the face of market fluctuations, with impressive scores reflecting the institution's preparedness for stress scenarios. This assessment underscores the bank's ability to navigate turbulent financial landscapes, showcasing its resilience with a strong shock absorption capacity. These findings position BNP Paribas as a stable and dependable entity in the banking industry, with its structural foundation proving to be resilient under pressure.
BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard Must Face Antitrust Lawsuit After Texas Judge Says Case Over Alleged Collusion Can Advance

data.title: Langflow allows creation of local AI agents on NVIDIA RTX GPUs, ensuring privacy, cost-effectiveness, and performance.
data.description: Langflow is empowering AI enthusiasts to develop personalized AI agents using cutting-edge NVIDIA RTX GPUs. This innovative platform provides users with a no-code interface, ensuring privacy, cost-effectiveness, and enhanced performance. With Langflow, individuals can leverage the power of AI technology with ease.

data.title: Stocks of crypto companies Coinbase, Riot Platforms, CleanSpark drop with BTC amid fears of tariffs. Marked fall due to job data, inflation, tariff fears.
data.description: The stock prices of Coinbase, Riot Platforms, and CleanSpark experienced significant declines during a widespread market downturn. This decrease was fueled by negative job data, worries about inflation, and renewed fears of tariffs.

data.title: BioConsortia secured funding to launch new nitrogen-fixing biofertilizer, fueling global expansion.
data.description: On Wednesday, BioConsortia, based in Davis, California, announced the successful closure of a significant round of financing aimed at expediting the release of their cutting-edge nitrogen-fixing biofertilizer. The funds will also be utilized to support the company's expansion efforts on a global scale.

data.title: Brown & Brown, Inc. acquired RSC Topco, Inc., parent company of Accession Risk Management Group.
data.description: On August 1st, 2025 in Daytona Beach, Florida, Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE:BRO) finalized the acquisition of RSC Topco, Inc., the parent company of Accession Risk Management Group, Inc.

data.title: Withum joins with Freed Maxick, P.C. enhancing Healthcare, Audit & Tax in Upstate and Western NY.
data.description: Withum is broadening its reach into Upstate and Western New York, enhancing its Healthcare, Audit, Advisory, and Tax services. The expansion was announced by Freed Maxick, P.C., a Buffalo, NY-based public accounting firm, on August 1, 2025. This move signifies a marked growth in Withum's presence in the region, providing a boost to their expertise in various sectors.

data.title: Stocks drop as Dow falls 500 points due to Trump tariffs, weak jobs report; bond yields also decline.
data.description: Early on Friday, there was a significant drop in stock prices due to a series of unfavorable news stories. This included the announcement of additional tariffs by President Trump and a disappointing jobs report. The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell by 500 points in response to these developments. Bond yields also experienced a sharp decline. This live coverage is detailed in the Investor's Business Daily.
